briefing:
## 🌍 Top 5 Global Fintech News

- **[Fintech founder charged with fraud; AI app found to be humans in the Philippines](https://techcrunch.com/2025/04/10/fintech-founder-charged-with-fraud-after-ai-shopping-app-found-to-be-powered-by-humans-in-the-philippines/)** — *Hacker News* — A fintech founder faces fraud charges after their "AI-powered" shopping app was revealed to be operated by human workers in the Philippines.

- **[Americans see their savings vanish in Synapse fintech crisis](https://www.cnbc.com/2024/11/22/synapse-bankruptcy-thousands-of-americans-see-their-savings-vanish.html)** — *Hacker News* — Thousands of Americans lost access to their savings following the bankruptcy of fintech middleware company Synapse, highlighting critical risks in embedded banking partnerships.

- **[Open Banking and Payments Competition](https://www.bitsaboutmoney.com/archive/open-banking-and-payments-competition/)** — *Hacker News* — A deep-dive analysis explores how open banking frameworks are reshaping competition in the payments landscape globally.

- **[Apple acquires UK open banking startup Credit Kudos](https://ffnews.com/newsarticle/apple-acquires-uk-open-banking-startup-credit-kudos/)** — *Hacker News* — Apple acquired UK-based open banking startup Credit Kudos, signalling Big Tech's growing interest in financial data and credit decisioning.

- **[Fintech is making credit cards weirder](https://workweek.com/2022/08/05/fintech-is-making-credit-cards-weirder/)** — *Hacker News* — Fintech innovation is driving a wave of unconventional credit card products with novel rewards, structures, and embedded finance features.

---

## 🍁 Top 5 Canadian Fintech News

- **[Common Wealth secures $12-million Series A to help deliver workplace retirement plans](https://betakit.com/common-wealth-secures-12-million-series-a-to-help-deliver-workplace-retirement-plans/)** — *BetaKit* — Canadian fintech Common Wealth has raised a $12-million Series A to expand its platform that makes workplace retirement savings plans more accessible to employees.

- **[How to fix Canadian VC](https://betakit.com/how-to-fix-canadian-vc/)** — *BetaKit* — A new analysis examines structural challenges in the Canadian venture capital ecosystem and proposes reforms to better support homegrown startups.

- **[Gap between richest and poorest Canadians widened again in 2025, StatsCan says](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-wealth-gap-grew-2025-9.7162167?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Statistics Canada data reveals Canada's wealth inequality grew further in 2025, underscoring the urgency of financial inclusion initiatives.

- **[The tough job market isn't getting any better for young Canadians](https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/calgary/tough-job-market-for-young-canadians-9.7163501?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Young Canadians continue to face a difficult labour market, raising concerns about long-term financial precarity and access to financial services.

- **[Canada calls screen scraping 'unsecure,' sets Open Banking target for 2023](https://finledger.com/2021/08/09/canada-sets-open-banking-target-for-2023/)** — *Hacker News* — *(Relevant to Canadian fintech regulation)* Canada flagged screen scraping as insecure and outlined ambitions to implement a secure open banking framework, a policy conversation still echoing in 2026.

---

## 🌊 Bonus: Relevant to Atlantic Fintech's Focus (1–3 articles)

- **[Common Wealth secures $12-million Series A to help deliver workplace retirement plans](https://betakit.com/common-wealth-secures-12-million-series-a-to-help-deliver-workplace-retirement-plans/)** — *BetaKit* — Common Wealth's growth highlights a significant opportunity for Atlantic Canadian credit unions and employers to adopt fintech-driven retirement solutions for underserved workers.

- **[How to fix Canadian VC](https://betakit.com/how-to-fix-canadian-vc/)** — *BetaKit* — With Atlantic Canada's fintech ecosystem relying heavily on venture investment to scale startups, this analysis of systemic VC gaps is directly relevant to founders and ecosystem builders in the region.

- **[Gap between richest and poorest Canadians widened again in 2025, StatsCan says](https://www.cbc.ca/news/business/canada-wealth-gap-grew-2025-9.7162167?cmp=rss)** — *CBC Business* — Growing wealth inequality in Canada reinforces the case for financial inclusion-focused fintech solutions, a core priority for Atlantic Fintech and the communities it serves.
